economic_notes: First Nation has 99% interest in HIAH Economic Dev LP engaged in business ventures for welfare/development of M'Chigeeng. Owns MERE General Partner Inc. (rental property operations). Investments in U.C.C.M. Building Material Supply LP (14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising LP (16.55%), Robinson Huron Forestry Inc. (12.5%), Great Lakes Hospitality Group Partnership (28.67%), Sun Life Financial Inc. (6,636 shares).
notes: MERE General Partner Inc. and HIAH Economic Dev LP accounted for by modified equity method (not fully consolidated). Advances to MERE ($3,799,609) are unsecured and non-interest bearing. Loan to MERE ($602,282) bears 6% interest, secured by promissory note. Cash includes $1,314,444 restricted for CMHC purposes. Health expenses split across Health Services ($1,316,436), Health Agreement ($1,651,153), and Health Other ($520,601). Community Property expense ($956,888) and Employment and Training ($555,311) also reported. Write-down of investment $35,714. COVID-19 effects noted (Note 16) but detail not visible in provided pages.
